tracks.title: Blood on the Disco
tracks.pitch: Hi! I'm Eric Francois Garcia, and this is 'Blood on the Disco', an energetic disco-funk track with catchy hooks and a feel-good vibe. It's been getting great feedback from early listeners and I think it would be a perfect fit for your playlist. Thanks for your time!

tracks.title: Get Outta My Sledge
tracks.pitch: Hi! I'm Eric Francois Garcia, and this is 'Get Outta My Sledge', a high-energy disco-funk banger perfect for dance floors and feel-good playlists. Would love to have it featured. Thanks for listening!

tracks.title: France 3000 Remix Club
tracks.pitch: Hi! I'm Eric Francois Garcia, and this is 'France 3000 Remix Club', a french house remix full of energy and groove. Perfect for disco, dance and french house playlists. Hope you enjoy it!
